channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Masses of litter over road and pavement in The Village, 28th April
item.description:
Two black bin bags left out split open overnight joining some.plastic water bottles still.peft over from the marathon. On odds (north) side of The Village around bus stop. Should have a daily street sweep in this area.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Village, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unstable planters close to falling, 28th April
item.description:
The one inn the wood micro pub has 6 eye sore planters across 2 parking bays. They look very dangerous and could kill a small child if they fell with children playing with/ around the planters, they are often filled with public rubbish. I believe they had their purpose during Covid but are now bringing the area down.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 207, Petts Wood Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose lamppost, 28th April
item.description:
I've reported this several times and it now moves in the breeze

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ingleton Avenue, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged railings Crayford Rd/Station Rd, Crayford, 28th April
item.description:
Damaged railings Crayford Rd/Station Rd, Crayford after RTA police have called this in ....on the east side of the r/about., also there is hydraulic fluid on the c/way
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Station Road, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 28th April
item.description:
Constant fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pendas Mead, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A massive tree that needs to be de crowned, 28th April
item.description:
This tree is situated at 43 Palace square off Pleydell avenue . It usually gets decrowned every ten years . It is well overdue and is massive
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, Palace Square, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 28th April
item.description:
.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 119, Chatham Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple bags of garden waste flytipped, 28th April
item.description:
At least five or six black sacks of garden waste have been dumped under the advertising billboard by the traffic lights between Thesiger Rd and Parish Lane. This has happened here a few times in the past. Perhaps the offender can be traced via the traffic cameras at the lights?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thesiger Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Significant levels of rubbish on footpaths on Alvington Crescent, 28th April
item.description:
There has been a significant uptick in the level of rubbish that has been left on both footpaths on Alvington Crescent. Could the council please send through sweepers and collectors to pick it all up. Unfortunately, any mess very quickly brings more mess.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alvington Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Many abandoned Forests, 28th April
item.description:
See image

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 42, Gloucester Circus, East Greenwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned shopping basket, 28th April
item.description:
Shopping basket dumped on Kingsdale Rd

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Penge, Greater London

item.title: Tree leaning over path., 28th April
item.description:
Tree is unstable and possibly the one next to it. I touched it and it seems ready to collapse.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 164, Croydon Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Furniture, 28th April
item.description:
Tenant has dumped wood and metal furniture causing an obstruction along public footpath on Myrtleberry Close.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Myrtleberry Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped fabric item, 28th April
item.description:
Someone has dumped a brightly coloured sleeping bag/sofa cover under the railway bridge where Parish Lane meets Bycroft Street, near the dry cleaners.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bycroft Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lorry hit rounadoubt by, 28th April
item.description:
Police reporting that a lorry has hit the roundabout by Crayford Mc Donald's the roundabout is damaged and there is fuel on the road. Please could someone look into this asap. Police Ref CHS28608 -28/04/2026
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Crayford Road, Crayford, Dartford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Olyffe Avenue, East Wickham, Greater London

item.title: Bird Wire Cut in Operation to free Pigeon, 28th April
item.description:
The bird wire under the railway bridge had to be cut to rescue a trapped pigeon, earlier.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Norwood Road, Herne Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Yellow street bin, 28th April
item.description:
Street bin junction with westwood lane and hook lane by bus stop in hook lane. Overflowing bin and litter not cleaned Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hook Lane, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
